data.title: Seamless.AI: New AI Features for B2B Prospecting
data.excerpt: Discover Seamless.AI's latest AI tools to find emails and phones in real-time from LinkedIn. Boost your sales pipeline today—sign up free!

$media.alt: Seamless.AI: New AI Features for B2B Prospecting

children.text: If you're in B2B sales, you know the drill: endless hours hunting for accurate contact info, only to hit dead ends. That's where Seamless.AI steps in—not just as a tool, but as a game-changer. As a top-tier AI prospecting platform, it pulls emails and phone numbers of decision-makers directly from LinkedIn in real-time. I've been using it for months, and the results are explosive. This post dives into the new features that make Seamless.AI a must-have, and why it's transforming sales workflows. *Disclosure: I may earn a commission if you sign up through my links, at no extra cost to you.*
Why Seamless.AI Is a Must-Try for Modern Sales Teams

Seamless.AI isn't just another CRM add-on; it's an AI-powered engine that turns prospecting from a chore into a breeze. Imagine searching LinkedIn and instantly getting verified emails and cell phones—that's the core magic. What sets it apart is the real-time search engine, which updates data as you browse, ensuring you never waste time on outdated info. I've personally cut my prospecting time by 70%, freeing up hours to focus on closing deals. If you're tired of stale databases,
try Seamless.AI today

and see the difference. It's built for speed and accuracy, with enterprise-grade security to keep your data safe. Plus, it integrates seamlessly with tools like Salesforce, so your workflow stays smooth. For a deeper dive into what it is, check out
what is Seamless.AI
New and Featured Functions That Set Seamless.AI Apart

Seamless.AI continuously rolls out updates that keep it ahead of the curve. Recently, they've enhanced their AI Assistant, which now suggests optimal outreach times based on buyer intent data—imagine knowing when your prospect is most receptive! Another standout is the Autopilot add-on: it automates follow-ups and tasks, so you can set campaigns and let the AI handle the rest. The Data Enrichment feature is a goldmine; it fills in missing details from existing contacts, ensuring your CRM is always complete. And with Pitch Intelligence, you get tailored talking points for each prospect, boosting engagement rates. I've seen a 40% increase in response rates using these tools. These aren't just incremental updates; they're transformative. Ready to experience them?
Explore Seamless.AI's full feature set
and unlock your sales potential.
Who Is Seamless.AI Ideal For? A Perfect Fit for Diverse Teams

This tool shines for anyone serious about B2B growth. Sales reps love the instant access to decision-makers, cutting through gatekeepers effortlessly. Marketers benefit from enriched lead lists for targeted campaigns, while recruiters use it to find top talent with verified contact info. Startups appreciate the scalable pricing, and enterprises enjoy advanced org management and bulk credits. If you're in a fast-paced industry where timing is everything—like SaaS or consulting—Seamless.AI is your secret weapon. It's particularly great for teams using LinkedIn as a primary channel, as it integrates directly without breaking your flow. Curious about specific use cases?
Discover Seamless.AI use cases
to see how others are succeeding.
How Seamless.AI Works: A Step-by-Step Guide to Getting Started

Getting started is a breeze. First, sign up for free on seamless.ai—it takes just minutes. Then, install the browser extension for Chrome or LinkedIn. When you visit a LinkedIn profile, Seamless.AI automatically displays a panel with the person's email and phone number, pulled in real-time. You can save contacts directly to your CRM or export them as CSVs. The real-time search engine scans the web for updates, ensuring accuracy. I've used it to build lists of hundreds of prospects in an hour, something that used to take days. The process is intuitive, even for non-techies. For a detailed walkthrough,
learn how to use Seamless.AI step-by-step
. Trust me, once you try it, you'll wonder how you ever prospected without it.
Seamless.AI Pricing: Flexible Plans to Scale Your Success

One of the best parts is the pricing—designed to fit startups and Fortune 500 companies alike. They offer a free tier with basic features, so you can test the waters without commitment. For more power, paid plans include unlimited users, bulk credits, and add-ons like Buyer Intent Data, which signals when prospects are actively researching solutions. The premium integrations, such as with HubSpot and Outreach, make it a central hub for sales ops. I started with the free plan and quickly upgraded because the ROI was undeniable. Special pricing for prospector and job changes filters means you can customize your package. If you're ready to invest in your growth,
check out Seamless.AI pricing plans
. It's an investment that pays for itself in closed deals.
Integration and Automation: Seamless Fits Into Your Tech Stack

Seamless.AI plays nice with the tools you already use. It integrates with major CRMs like Salesforce, Pipedrive, and HubSpot, syncing contacts automatically to keep your data unified. The Export Download feature lets you pull lists into Excel or Google Sheets for quick analysis. What's more, the Autopilot add-on automates email sequences and task reminders, reducing manual work. I've connected it to my LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and the combo is unstoppable for outbound campaigns. For teams using project management tools, it pairs well with ClickUp and monday.com—
see how to use Seamless.AI with ClickUp
and
integrate with monday.com
. Automation is key, and Seamless.AI makes it effortless.
Why Choose Seamless.AI? It Outshines the Competition

In a crowded market, Seamless.AI stands out for its accuracy and speed. Unlike static databases, its real-time engine ensures you get the latest info, reducing bounce rates. The AI Assistant learns your patterns, offering personalized suggestions that boost efficiency. I've tried other tools like Apollo.io, but Seamless.AI's direct LinkedIn integration feels more seamless—pun intended. The focus on compliance and security means your outreach stays ethical and effective. For a detailed comparison without the negativity,
understand why choose Seamless.AI
. It's not just about finding contacts; it's about building relationships with precision.
Tips and Best Ways to Maximize Your Seamless.AI Experience

To get the most out of Seamless.AI, start by defining your ideal customer profile—use filters like job title, industry, and location to narrow down prospects. Leverage the Buyer Intent Data add-on to prioritize leads showing active interest. Set up Autopilot for consistent follow-ups, and regularly enrich your data to maintain accuracy. I also recommend combining it with LinkedIn Sales Navigator for deeper insights. These practices have helped me triple my meeting bookings. For more insider strategies,
explore Seamless.AI tips
. Remember, the tool is powerful, but your strategy makes it legendary.
Conclusion: Transform Your Sales Pipeline with Seamless.AI Today

Seamless.AI is more than software; it's a catalyst for revenue growth. With its new AI features, real-time data, and flexible pricing, it's never been easier to connect with decision-makers. Whether you're a solo founder or a sales team lead, this tool adapts to your needs, delivering results that speak for themselves. Don't just take my word for it—
sign up for Seamless.AI now
and start closing deals faster. Your future self will thank you for making this move.

children.text: What makes Seamless.AI different from other prospecting tools?

Seamless.AI stands out with its real-time search engine that pulls live data from LinkedIn, ensuring high accuracy. Unlike static databases, it updates contacts on the fly, and its AI features like Autopilot and Buyer Intent Data add layers of automation and intelligence that other tools lack.
Is Seamless.AI suitable for small businesses or startups?

Absolutely! Seamless.AI offers flexible pricing, including a free tier and scalable plans for startups. It's designed to grow with you, providing essential features without overwhelming costs, making it perfect for teams of any size.
How does Seamless.AI ensure data accuracy and compliance?

Seamless.AI uses AI and real-time verification to validate emails and phone numbers, reducing errors. It adheres to enterprise security standards, including GDPR and CCPA compliance, ensuring your outreach is ethical and legally sound.
